design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px/2.5lines; AIDA=pass; density=grid-auto-flow:dense; contrast=black/white pills; labels=checked
headline: Super vs Folk — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair, practical comparison for people evaluating Super and Folk. Folk sits within the broader automation and assistant market. Super is purpose‑built for personal AI agents that actually operate computers — with a reusable computer-use cache that makes repeated workflows faster, cheaper, and more reliable over time.
